title: Paraspalathus cerrhantha
taxonomy: Paraspalathus cerrhantha is classified within the family Fabaceae, which is commonly known as the legume family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its compound leaves and flower structure, which are typical of Fabaceae species. Paraspalathus cerrhantha is also a part of the subfamily Faboideae, which is a large and diverse group within the Fabaceae family. At the genus level, Paraspalathus cerrhantha is classified as a species within the genus Paraspalathus. Further classification at the species level is required for a more specific understanding of the plant's taxonomy.
